text.title: E2E Framework Migration Playbook Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the e2e-framework-migration-playbook methodology.

example.title: Cypress→Playwright over 12 weeks
example.narrative: Mid-size SaaS. ~180 E2E tests in Cypress. ADR justifies move: better debugging, native parallelism, mobile support. Wave 1: port login + dashboard flow (15 tests) over 1 week. Parity proven (same results, 40% faster). Wave 2: codemod converts cy.get/cy.contains to page.locator with text/role; 60% of tests auto-converted, remaining 40% hand-ported with team rotation. Both Cypress and Playwright CI jobs run dual-test-window for 8 weeks. Wave 3: feature flag (process.env.TEST_RUNNER) flips default to Playwright; old Cypress run remains nightly for 2 weeks. No regressions. Wave 4: Cypress package removed, /cypress dir deleted, related CI jobs dropped, docs updated. Total elapsed: 11 weeks.
example.artifact: migration-tracker.md with all 4 waves, wave-record.json per wave, parity reports per module, decommission PR closing migration.
